h6h3svqr6203sco8jcd55i9gec.summary: Reviewing your Google Drive 'Work Notes' folder yielded no matches for 'IP assist' or '2-way SMS' over the past week—the current documentation focuses instead on process mining, Life Company modernization, and the AWS agent assist POC. You must address this documentation gap directly with James Karras to clarify if these initiatives are tracked under different nomenclature—or if project tracking has stalled entirely. Aligning on these communication capabilities is critical before the meeting series ends on January 29, 2027.
tasks: Ask James Karras for an immediate status update on IP assist and 2-way SMS—neither topic appears in your recent work notes.
Verify if these initiatives are currently grouped under the AWS agent assist POC or Conversant desktop integrations.
Establish a dedicated logging process in your Google Drive 'Work Notes' folder to capture future updates on these communication channels.
Clarify if these capabilities will play a role in the upcoming 2027 Life Company digital advisory launch.
h6h3svqr6203sco8jcd55i9gec.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/James Karras | Mark Francis (series ends 1/29/27)

ndhi5nicfjqp21gq3rb4vi7rus.summary: Your weekly work notes focus on major strategic shifts—specifically parallel-pathing the Skan.ai task mining RFP, modernizing legacy systems, and using Celonis to bypass data latency. You must manage persistent resource gaps—including unfilled vacancies for key roles—though your files lack explicit details on Rebecca's departure and the resulting organizational changes. Technical teams are also actively pushing back against tool-centric limitations—demanding you stop forcing ServiceNow to perform process monitoring functions it was never designed to handle.
tasks: Clarify the immediate operational impact of Rebecca's departure and confirm the transition plans for the vacant leadership roles left by Matt Unsworth and Deepak.
Establish a clear architectural position paper on process observability to prevent teams from misusing ServiceNow for business health monitoring.
Refine the communication strategy for the AWS desktop integration to prevent stakeholders from misinterpreting the pilot as an immediate decommissioning of Conversant.
Account for a 15–20% delivery capacity hit across your teams to absorb the demands of the cybersecurity uplift program.
ndhi5nicfjqp21gq3rb4vi7rus.title: Weekly Staff – P&C CTO Leadership (series ends 7/9/26)

5dkh7vjgggkshg3kfr2pmukfe8.summary: Review your key themes from the past week—the strategic transition to end-to-end process mining using Skan.ai and Celonis, and the strict resource management around Copilot credit allocations. Address the operational constraints from unfilled roles—noting that no current work notes exist for the departure of Rebecca Neussel—which require immediate tactical reassignments. Focus your upcoming discussion on resolving these resource deficits and establishing the path forward for the AWS desktop integration.
tasks: Align with Jon and Mark on the parallel strategic paths for Skan.ai task mining and Celonis process health visualization.
Enforce the restricted enterprise-wide pooling model for GitHub Copilot credits to curb high consumption.
Establish tactical reassignment plans to address the departure of Rebecca Neussel and the frozen backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak.
Present the embedded UI widget as the recommended architecture path for the AWS MSR desktop proof of concept.
5dkh7vjgggkshg3kfr2pmukfe8.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Jon | Mark (series end 12/16/26)
